top_signals.title: EasyJet Board Says No Talks Yet on Offer, Confident in Strategy
top_signals.summary: EasyJet Plc’s board said it hasn’t engaged in discussions yet with Castlelake LP after the investment firm said it’s considering an offer for the UK budget airline, while remaining confident in its strategy underpinned by its cash position and profit outlook.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wall Street bulls bet US stocks rally will defy bubble fears
top_signals.summary: Investors and strategists shrug off worries that markets could be overheating by betting on huge gains for AI-linked shares
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Palo Alto GlobalProtect VPN auth bypass flaw now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Palo Alto Networks is warning that hackers are now exploiting a PAN-OS GlobalProtect authentication bypass flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-0257, in attacks attempting to breach corporate networks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
